data.body: It's also just a funny way to get around the swearing censorship in places. Many places will censor 他妈的, but if they abbreviated it to TMD, it's no problem 😂. Similarly 草 or 艹(grass) instead of 操 (fuck) or even swapping to writing the exact same character but in Japanese, where it just means control
